CONTACTID.TEXT: Hello Ma'am, are you the one that called in a disturbance?
Hello Officer. Yes I did. Can you hear that loud music?
Yes. How long have they been playing their music that loudly?
It's been going on for at least 4 hours now. Can you please stop it? It is coming from that house.
I'll do my best to have them shut it off. Thanks for letting us know about it.
Thank you Officer.
Hello everybody. Who is the owner of this property?
Hello Officer. This is my house... Is there a problem?
Hi, we have a complaint from one of your neighbours regarding the loud music. What's your name sir?
I'm not telling you that! We're having a party, they should expect to hear us!
Alright sir, well I need you to turn down the volume.
Fine... If you say so. Give me a second...
Better now?
Yes, thank you for your cooperation. Have a fun rest of your time.
Whatever party killer...
Sir, do you think its necessary for me to have to come back again?
Oh hey officer. Sorry, I guess one of my friends turned the volume up. I'll go turn it down.
Well this is my second time here. I don't care about excuses. Turn off the music.
Why? Haven't you had fun as a teen? Quit complaining, we're having fun!
I warned you already. Turn it off now.
No. You can't make me. Im sick of you trying to ruin my party.
There are two ways this will end. First, you turn off the music and continue your party.
Second, if you refuse to cooperate, the party ends and I will take you in for disturbing the peace. Its your choice.
Alright then... I will turn off the music.
Happy now?
Wise decision my friend. Regardless of this action, have a nice day.
Leave my property. The people around here suck...
Fuckin' pig!
Okay bud, put your hands where I can see them. You are going to jail for disturbing the peace.
Wow, I can't believe this. Clearly someone doesn't know how to have fun!
Excuse me sir, are you the one that called regarding the loud music?
Hi Officer. Yes, I was the one that called the police.
I'm assuming you are talking about the music that I'm hearing in background?
Yes. Those party-goers are always partying, and us neighbors are always suffering! Can you shut it down please?
Certainly. I will take to the owner and ask them to lower the volume.
Thank you so much officer.
Hi. I'm officer {0}. Who is responsible for this party?
That's me. Michael De Santa. Is there a problem officer?
Yes Mr. De Santa. Sorry to interrupt but people in your neighborhood are complaining about the loud music.
Oh come on, this is a celebration party for my daughter Tracy. She finally got a job on TV.
Well that's nice to hear Michael, but I need you to turn down the volume.
Alright then, give me second...
Are you satisfied with it now?
Thank you Mr. De Santa. I appreciate your cooperation. Have a nice party.
It won't be as fun...
Can I talk to you for again Mr. De Santa?
What now?
Why is the music so loud again?
Do you really want an answer for that?
Basically I don't care. Turn off the music, or I will take you to jail.
What the fuck? Why are you acting like a pussy?
I asked you kindly to turn off the music, and now you have no choice.
Turn off the music before I take you in.
Okay okay, don't lose yourself.
Happy now?
If I have to come back again, you're going straight to the station. Goodbye Mr. De Santa.
Whatever dude. Go back to your group therapy...knuckle head
The hell I will!
Then I will take you down to the station for disturbing the peace. Let me see your hands.
This is stupid. I'm gunna call my lawyer you son of a bitch!
Hello. Did you call 911 reporting loud music?
Hello Officer. Yes. They have been playing it for a few hours. Enough is enough!
I agree. Has the volume always been this loud?
There were a few minutes it was quiet, but its been like this for hours.
Okay. I'll make contact with the house owner and ask them to turn down the volume.
Thank you for taking this seriously.
Hello. Can I talk to the house owner for minute?
Yo dog, I'm Franklin Clinton. This is my crib, whats going on?
Hello Mr. Clinton, we got a complaint regarding your loud music.
What? This ain't too loud. People still can talk to each other...
Regardless, please turn down the volume.
Fine, if I have to...
Is this okay for my officer friend?
Yes it is. Thanks for your cooperation.
Thank you officer!
Hey Mr. Clinton, come back over here please.
Hey yo. What'cha doing here again?
I'm back because the music is too loud again.
I think its the same volume as when you left. The dude complaining must have a pair of damaged ears.
Sir, you need to turn off the volume now.
What? No, I'll just turn it down. It doesn't have to be turned off!
Sir, please don't make this harder than it has to be.
Turn off the music, before I take you to jail for disturbing the peace.
Eh, if the cop says to turn it off, I guess I have to turn it off...
Silence has arrived. Are you happy?
I hope you keep it like this. Thank you.
Sorry for causing you the hassle, officer."
You know what, go suck a mighty...
Okay, put your hands where I can see them. You are being placed under arrest for disturbing the peace.
Jail ain't gunna do nothing, pig!
Hi Ma'am. Did you call 911 because of a disturbing noise?
Hi Officer. Yes I called the cops. The party is too wild. They are throwing beer bottles and doing other bizarre things...
Did they throw anything out into the streets or at your houses?
Luckily they didn't. Its the house over there with The Lost van.
Seems to be a biker party. Why don't you go back inside while we handle the party.
Thank you.
Hi everyone. Who is the owner here?
That would be me. What can I do for the pig in a uniform?
Your music is too loud. I'm going to have to ask you to turn it down.
Nah, I don't hear any music.
Do you want to cooperate, or should I take you to jail for disturbing the peace?
If thats how you want to be, let me go turn it down.
Don't think that you have won.
Alright bud, thanks for cooperating. Don't make me have to come out again.
Seeya pig in a uniform!
Sir, come over here for a minute.
Whats going on pig in a uniform? Want to join us?
No. You need to turn off the music and stop the party.
Nah! I don't hear any music, and I don't think any of my brothers or sisters do.
It'll take some time to write down all the violations I see here. I think it will be a hefty fine, unless you would like to cooperate.
Whats your fucking problem pig in a uniform?
My problem is that you feel the need to not listen.
Last chance. Turn off the music, or you will go to jail for disturbing the peace.
This time I will listen.
Next time I won't.
Next time you're going to jail if you don't cooperate. Have a great day.
Fucking pigs in a uniform. You did not win this battle.
You motherfucking pig in a uniform. I won't do a thing that you're saying!
Show me your hands. You are currently being placed under arrest for disturbing the peace.
That is why I hate cops.
Hello Ma'am. You have called the police because of a loud party?
Hi Officer. Do you hear the music? It is now the third time that this bitch has a party like this.
No need to insult your neighbour. Did you talk to her?
No I won't talk to her. The house is over there. Try the door at the left, otherwise you will find them on the top terrace.
Ok thanks for the info. Please get back into your house. I will take care about this issue.
I hope she goes to jail, bye.
Hello everybody. I need to talk to the owner of this house.
Hello officer, that's me. What can i do for you?
There has been a report of civil disturbance because of loud music.
Are you sure that's my party?
Yes I'm sure. Please do me a favour and lower the volume to adequate noise level.
Well then ok, wait here.
This is the maximum I want to lower it. Is it ok?
Yes Miss, thank you and have a nice day.
Bye.
Miss, step over here please!
Ahm ok? What did I do wrong now?
The noise level is back to its original. Can you tell me why?
No it is still the same as you left. You must have something with you ears.
My ears are fine, but it seems like you memory is not. Turn off the music immediatly!
Why are you so unfriendly? I don't like that.
Well I don't like that you are lying to me.
I will say this only once. Turn off the music now or i will pull the plug and take you down to the station.
Alright, sorry I do it.
I don't want to have any trouble.
Next time think about this when you lie to the police. Goodbye.
What a jerk!
You know what. NO. I think you are overreacting. The noise level is fine.
I have enough of this. You can explain this down at the station. Show me your hands.
Stupid whore downstairs. She is the one who should get arrested
